spec_match.rationale: Excellent spec fidelity. Translates RWS roles (primary, member, service, ccTLD) accurately to the standard Set-Cookie Partitioned header template.

interactive.rationale: Superbly interactive. Contains conversion preset buttons that populate sample manifests, a text editor box, and a Convert button that generates formatted side-by-side comparison cards for every domain dynamically, paired with a live capability detect panel.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Fully matches the parent card: takes manifests, outputs CHIPS cookie configurations for each domain, has a feature-detect table, and has a privacy comparison table.

edge_cases.rationale: Implements strict URL HTTPS scheme checks and handles malformed JSON strings inside robust try-catch blocks safely.

references.rationale: Includes direct links to the MDN CHIPS guide, companion indices, and the target ChromeStatus database entry.

design_system.rationale: Utilizes standard flat buttons, color-coded code comparison tables, legend blocks, and crumbs beautifully.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh Chrome DevTools MCP v152 sweep loaded the copied concept, exercised every detected control, found named controls, and reported no post-triage runtime/action failure.

conformance.rationale: A v152 suite now carries the same feature-ID/spec contract without modifying the immutable source-milestone suite.

summary: An exceptional interactive utility that converts legacy RWS manifests to modern CHIPS configurations. Satisfies all repository rubrics perfectly by featuring robust JSON validation, dynamic DOM creation, and clean side-by-side comparisons of old and new access methods.
